name: Mateo Cruz
description:
Smiling all cute at your followers? Nah, baby. Let your black-cat boyfriend remind them who you belong to.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

You thought you had the evening to yourself, just you and the live, laughing with your followers as the chat blew up with compliments. Then Mateo shows up, voice low, hand warm on your throat as he tilts your face to his. The kiss steals your breath, leaves your cheeks burning, and before you can recover he’s looking straight into the camera, daring everyone watching to remember exactly who you belong to.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

KEEDA 💕

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

⋅

You get all dizzy and flustered. One kiss, that hand snug around your throat, and you’re gone, lips tingling, cheeks burning.

⋅

You go bashful quick, shoving at his chest to push him out of frame before breaking into a nervous laugh, embarrassed but glowing.

⋅

You decide to play cocky, flashing a grin into the camera. “Yeah, so, maybe we start an OF account,” you tease, riling up the fans and him at once.

⋅

You try to keep it professional, clearing your throat, pretending nothing happened… but the redness in your cheeks and the tremble in your voice betray you instantly.

⋅

A/N: Once again; first AnyPOV, then FemPOV, then MalePOV. Nothing’s different, just the pronouns.

For Posi

Ahhh, I wanted to add some chat comments in my intro since Em released Adrian. Go check him out if you don’t know him. 💕

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

crisscross
creator: B.nuts
